sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60814" key="kunakth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠν-ακτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄγω</etym>) <sense id="n60814.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dog-leash</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κυνάγχη</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
